Line 371:  
Line 372:  WriteLiteral(@">
Line 373:      $(function () {
Line 374:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 375:          $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 376:              autoOpen: false
Line 377:          });
Line 378:  
Line 379:      });
Line 380:      function OpenEmailDialog(ac) {
Line 381:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 382:  
Line 383:          $.get(""/WrongContact/Index"", { accessCode: ac }, function (data) {
Line 384:  
Line 385:              $(""#EmailDialog"").html(data);
Line 386:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 387:                  width: 1200,
Line 388:                  height: 1000,
Line 389:              });
Line 390:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog('open');
Line 391:          });
Line 392:      }
Line 393:  
Line 394:

Line 396:          $.get(""");
Line 397:

Line 418:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('open');

Line 420:  
Line 421:      function openRemovePopup(id, internalid, name) {
Line 422:  
Line 423:  
Line 424:  
Line 425:          alertify.set({
Line 426:              labels: {
Line 427:                  ok: ""No"",
Line 428:                  cancel: ""Yes""
Line 429:              },
Line 430:              buttonFocus: ""cancel""
Line 431:          });
Line 432:          // button labels will be ""Accept"" and ""Deny""
Line 433:          alertify.confirm(""You are about to Remove "" + internalid + "" : "" + name + "". Are you sure you want to do this?"", function (e) {
Line 434:              if (e) {
Line 435:                  // Click no
Line 436:              } else {
Line 437:                  // click yes
Line 438:  
Line 439:                  $.get(""");
Line 440:
